decisions.title: adopt RabbitMQ for async notification job queue
decisions.rationale: RabbitMQ chosen over Kafka and AWS SQS. Kafka over-engineered for current throughput and retention needs (no stream replay or multi-consumer fan-out required). SQS introduces AWS vendor lock-in the team wants to avoid.
evidence: no requirement for stream replay or multi-consumer fan-out at current scale — Kafka capabilities unnecessary
